2605.02503.title: DataClaw: A Process-Oriented Agent Benchmark for Exploratory Real-World Data Analysis
2605.02503.paper_summary: Evaluating autonomous data analysis agents requires testing their ability to perform exploratory analysis in underexplored data environments. However, many existing benchmarks emphasize final answer accuracy in prior-guided data settings and provide limited support for reasoning process evaluation. We introduce DataClaw, a process-oriented benchmark for exploratory real-world data analysis. DataClaw contains approximately 2.06 million real-world records across enterprise, industry and policy domains, with native data noise preserved. It further includes 492 cross-domain tasks derived from think-tank consulting scenarios, each annotated with intermediate milestones for process-level evaluation. These annotations allow DataClaw to measure how far an agent progresses and where its reasoning breaks down. Experiments with eight advanced LLMs show that current agents remain far from reliable in this setting, with seven models achieving below 50% overall accuracy. Process analysis further reveals partial progress hidden behind wrong answers and distinct exploration strategies across models. Overall, DataClaw provides a less data constrained diagnostic testbed for probing the capability boundaries of autonomous data-analysis agents.
2605.02503.paper_summary_zh: 評估自主數據分析代理需要測試它們在未充分探索的數據環境中執行探索性分析的能力。<lb/>然而，許多現有的基準強調在先前引導的數據環境中最終答案的準確性，並對推理過程的評估提供有限的支持。<lb/>我們介紹了DataClaw，一個以過程為導向的探索性現實數據分析基準。<lb/>DataClaw包含約206萬條來自企業、行業和政策領域的現實記錄，並保留了原生數據噪聲。<lb/>它還包括492個來自智庫諮詢場景的跨領域任務，每個任務都附有中間里程碑的註釋，以便進行過程級別的評估。<lb/>這些註釋使DataClaw能夠衡量代理的進展程度以及其推理的崩潰點。<lb/>對八個先進LLM的實驗顯示，當前的代理在這一環境中仍然遠未可靠，七個模型的整體準確率低於50%。<lb/>過程分析進一步揭示了錯誤答案背後隱藏的部分進展和模型之間不同的探索策略。<lb/>總體而言，DataClaw提供了一個不那麼受數據限制的診斷測試平台，用於探測自主數據分析代理的能力邊界。
2605.02503.author: Qiaohong Zhang et.al.
2605.02503.authors: Qiaohong Zhang, Weihao Ye, Jialong Chen, Yi Luo, BoYuan Li, Bowen Deng, Zibin Zheng, Jianhao Lin, Wei-Shi Zheng, Chuan Chen
